the MDCD_PD_AMT and TOT_MDCD_PD_AMT variables. The data for some data elements that 
capture dollar amounts on managed care encounters, including the values reported by states in 
the MDCD_PD_AMT and TOT_MDCD_PD_AMT variables, are suppressed for most data users 
because of the proprietary nature of that information to a managed care plan’s business. Data 
users who do have access to those dollar amounts should avoid double counting the amount paid
